allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/health" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/normalize" -Method OPTIONS -TimeoutSec 3 -Headers @{"Origin"="http://localhost:5173";"Access-Control-Request-Method"="POST";"Access-Control-Request-Headers"="content-type"}; Write-Host "OPTIONS $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "OPTIONS FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"situation_text":"테스트","fields":{"hazard_raw":[],"environment_factor_raw":[],"human_factor_raw":[]}}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/normalize" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "POST /api/normalize $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"submitted_by":"test","situation_text":"테스트"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/cases/start" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "POST /api/cases/start $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,100\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"normalized":{"accident_type":"감전","work_type":"점검","hazard_major_category":"전기 위험","hazard_middle_category":"검전 미실시","environment_factors":[],"human_factors":[],"confidence":0.5,"ai_recommendations":{"accident_type":["감전"],"work_type":["점검"],"hazard":["전기 위험"],"environment_factors":[],"human_factors":[],"equipment":[],"hazard_raw_matched":"","reason":"test"}},"meta":{"submitted_by":"test"}}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/analyze" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "POST /api/analyze $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\): $\($_.Exception.Message.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200,$_.Exception.Message.Length\)\)\)" })
